name: obsidian
description: Let Claude read, search and edit your local Obsidian vault, running entirely on your machine.
long_description: Connect Claude to your Obsidian vault to list, read, search and (optionally) edit your notes. It works locally through the community plugin Local REST API by coddingtonbear, which exposes your vault on your own computer. Nothing leaves your machine. You stay in control with per-capability permissions: read is always on, editing is on by default, and deleting is off by default.

tools.name: obsidian_list_files_in_vault
tools.description: List all files and directories in the vault root.

tools.name: obsidian_list_files_in_dir
tools.description: List files and directories inside a specific folder.

tools.name: obsidian_get_file_contents
tools.description: Return the full content of a single note.

tools.name: obsidian_batch_get_file_contents
tools.description: Return the contents of several notes at once.

tools.name: obsidian_complex_search
tools.description: Advanced search using a JsonLogic query.

tools.name: obsidian_get_recent_periodic_notes
tools.description: Get the most recent periodic notes of a period type.

tools.name: obsidian_append_content
tools.description: Append markdown content to a new or existing note.

tools.name: obsidian_patch_content
tools.description: Insert content relative to a heading, block or frontmatter field.

tools.name: obsidian_delete_file
tools.description: Permanently delete a file or directory from the vault.

api_key.title: Obsidian API key
api_key.description: Copy this from the Local REST API plugin settings in Obsidian.

allow_writes.title: Allow creating and editing notes
allow_writes.description: Let Claude add to and modify your notes. Turn off for read-only access.

allow_delete.title: Allow deleting notes
allow_delete.description: Let Claude permanently delete notes. Off by default; this action is destructive.
